lines.lyric: Naega mwol eojjeogesseo naneun neoga eopseumyeon
lines.lyric_hangul: 내가 뭘 어쩌겠어 나는 네가 없으면
lines.lyric_translation: What can I do? Without you

lines.lyric: Nalgeun robotcheoreom mami meomchugo neul chagawo
lines.lyric_hangul: 낡은 로봇처럼 맘이 멈추고 늘 차가워
lines.lyric_translation: I’m just an old robot, my heart stops and it’s always cold

lines.lyric: Urin mwol eojjeogesseo neoneun naega eopseumyeon yeh
lines.lyric_hangul: 우린 뭘 어쩌겠어 너는 내가 없으면 yeah, yeah
lines.lyric_translation: What can we do? Without me

lines.lyric: Narang ttokgachi himdeul tende mwol eojjeogesseo uri yeh
lines.lyric_hangul: 나랑 똑같이 힘들 텐데 뭘 어쩌겠어 우리 yeah
lines.lyric_translation: You’ll struggle just as much, so what can we do?

lines.lyric: Baby uriye ttatteuthameul geudaero ganjikhago shipeo
lines.lyric_hangul: Baby 우리의 따뜻함을 그대로 간직하고 싶어
lines.lyric_translation: Baby, I want to cherish our warmth

lines.lyric: Eotteon nugurado uri sai pulji mothaeseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 어떤 누구라도 우리 사이 풀지 못해서
lines.lyric_translation: So no one can come between us

lines.lyric: Tell me naye neo tell me naye neo
lines.lyric_hangul: Tell me 나의 너 Tell me 나의 너
lines.lyric_translation: Tell me, you’re mine, tell me, I’m yours

lines.lyric: Mal jom haejwo nae aneseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 말 좀 해줘 내 안에서
lines.lyric_translation: Tell me, you’re in me

lines.lyric: Nan ne maeum aneseo balbeodung chigo isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 난 네 마음 안에서 발버둥 치고 있어
lines.lyric_translation: I’m in you squirming inside

lines.lyric: Deolkeok geobi naneungeol
lines.lyric_hangul: 덜컥 겁이 나는 걸
lines.lyric_translation: I’m suddenly afraid

lines.lyric: Eojjeogesseo nan neoga eopseumyeon
lines.lyric_hangul: 어쩌겠어 난 네가 없으면
lines.lyric_translation: What do I do? Without you

lines.lyric_hangul: 내 마음 편히 기댈 집이 없어 (Oh baby)
lines.lyric_translation: My heart has no home (oh baby)

parts.lyric: Nae maeum pyeonhi gidael jibi eopseo

lines.lyric: Nae sogeun neoreul wihae bieo isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 내 속은 너를 위해 비어 있어
lines.lyric_translation: I’ve kept my insides empty for you

lines.lyric: Eojji bomyeon jogeum eoryeobgetjiman
lines.lyric_hangul: 어찌 보면 조금 어렵겠지만
lines.lyric_translation: Things might seem hard

lines.lyric: Eonjerado nan yeogi seo isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 언제라도 난 여기 서 있어
lines.lyric_translation: But I’ll always be here

lines.lyric: Pyeonhage saenggakhaedo dwae
lines.lyric_hangul: 편하게 생각해도 돼
lines.lyric_translation: So don’t think too difficultly

lines.lyric: Cause I’m your home home home home
lines.lyric_hangul: 'Cause I'm your home, home, home, home
lines.lyric_translation: Cause I’m your home home home home

lines.lyric: Cause I’m your home home home home
lines.lyric_hangul: 'Cause I'm your home, home, home, home
lines.lyric_translation: Cause I’m your home home home home

lines.lyric: Cause I’m your home home home home
lines.lyric_hangul: 'Cause I'm your home, home, home, home
lines.lyric_translation: Cause I’m your home home home home

lines.lyric: Nega ul su itneun got, nega ol su itneun got
lines.lyric_hangul: 네가 울 수 있는 곳 네가 올 수 있는 곳
lines.lyric_translation: A place you can come to, a place you can come to

lines.lyric: Imi naneun neoye maeumeul apjireun geot gata jigeumeun
lines.lyric_hangul: 이미 나는 너의 마음을 앞지른 것 같아 지금은
lines.lyric_translation: I think my heart has surpassed you already

lines.lyric: Geureotago ne mami jakdaneun ge anya
lines.lyric_hangul: 그렇다고 네 맘이 작다는 게 아냐
lines.lyric_translation: But I’m not saying your heart is small

lines.lyric: Bakkeun yeojeonhi chuwo shirin kokkeucheun deo
lines.lyric_hangul: Yeah 밖은 여전히 추워 시린 코끝은 더
lines.lyric_translation: It’s still cold outside, the tip of my nose is tingling

lines.lyric: Urireul meolliseodo dagaseoge haneun chueok
lines.lyric_hangul: 우리를 멀리서도 다가서게 하는 추억
lines.lyric_translation: Though we’re far away, the memories bring us closer

lines.lyric_hangul: 네 마음에 구멍 나면 두 손으로 막아 주면 돼
lines.lyric_translation: If your heart has a hole / I’ll cover it with my hands

lines.lyric: Bin sonirado naemireo jwo naega chaeulge
lines.lyric_hangul: 빈손이라도 내밀어 줘 내가 채울게
lines.lyric_translation: Even if your hands are empty, give them to me so I can fill them up

lines.lyric: Tell me naye neo tell me naye neo
lines.lyric_hangul: Tell me 나의 너 Tell me 나의 너
lines.lyric_translation: Tell me, you’re mine, tell me, I’m yours

lines.lyric: Mal jom haejwo nae aneseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 말 좀 해줘 내 안에서
lines.lyric_translation: Tell me, you’re in me

lines.lyric_hangul: 난 네 마음 안에서 (마음 안에서)
lines.lyric_translation: I’m in you

lines.lyric_hangul: 발버둥 치고 있어 (치고 있어)
lines.lyric_translation: Squirming inside

lines.lyric: Deolkeok geobi naneungeol
lines.lyric_hangul: 덜컥 겁이 나는 걸
lines.lyric_translation: I’m suddenly afraid

lines.lyric: Eojjeogesseo nan neoga eopseumyeon
lines.lyric_hangul: 어쩌겠어 난 네가 없으면
lines.lyric_translation: What do I do? Without you

lines.lyric_hangul: 내 마음 편히 기댈 집이 없어 (Oh baby)
lines.lyric_translation: My heart has no home (oh baby)

parts.lyric: Nae maeum pyeonhi gidael jibi eopseo

lines.lyric: Nae sogeun neoreul wihae bieo isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 내 속은 너를 위해 비어 있어
lines.lyric_translation: I’ve kept my insides empty for you

lines.lyric: Eojji bomyeon jogeum eoryeobgetjiman
lines.lyric_hangul: 어찌 보면 조금 어렵겠지만
lines.lyric_translation: Things might seem hard

lines.lyric: Eonjerado nan yeogi seo isseo
lines.lyric_hangul: 언제라도 난 여기 서 있어
lines.lyric_translation: But I’ll always be here

lines.lyric: Pyeonhage saenggakhaedo dwae
lines.lyric_hangul: 편하게 생각해도 돼
lines.lyric_translation: So don’t think too difficultly

lines.lyric: Naneun ireoke neoreul bonaego shipji ana
lines.lyric_hangul: 나는 이렇게 너를 보내고 싶지 않아
lines.lyric_translation: I don’t wanna let you go like this

lines.lyric: Mami buseojin chaero maeil museobgo shipji ana
lines.lyric_hangul: 맘이 부서진 채로 매일 무섭고 싶지 않아
lines.lyric_translation: I don’t want to be scared with a broken heart

lines.lyric: Naneun neoege isseul got
lines.lyric_hangul: 나는 너에게 있을 곳
lines.lyric_translation: I’m the place you can come to

lines.lyric: Neoneun naege isseul got
lines.lyric_hangul: 너는 나에게 있을 곳
lines.lyric_translation: You’re the place I can go to

lines.lyric: Cause I’m your home home home home
lines.lyric_hangul: 'Cause I'm your home, home, home, home (Home, home, home, home)
lines.lyric_translation: Cause I’m your home home home home

lines.lyric: Cause I’m your home home home home
lines.lyric_hangul: 'Cause I'm your home, home, home, home
lines.lyric_translation: Cause I’m your home home home home

lines.lyric: Because you’re my home home home home
lines.lyric_hangul: Because you're my home, home, home, home
lines.lyric_translation: Because you’re my home home home home

lines.lyric: Nega ul su itneun got, nado ul su itneun got
lines.lyric_hangul: 네가 울 수 있는 곳 나도 울 수 있는 곳
lines.lyric_translation: A place you can come to, a place I can go to
